semantic.role: Define and enforce layered architecture constraints for the ArchSpine project to maintain domain purity and proper dependency direction.
responsibilities: Ensuring domain layer remains independent of infrastructure and presentation concerns.
Maintaining correct dependency direction: API -> Service/Domain, Domain -> Domain only.
Providing explicit rules for domain isolation, interface-only dependency, and API layer separation.
outOfScope: Specific implementation details of infrastructure or CLI layers.
Rules for other architectural concerns like data flow or error handling.

English.purpose: The purpose of this document is to codify the architectural constraints that enforce a classic layered architecture in ArchSpine, preventing reverse dependencies and ensuring the domain layer remains pure and focused.
English.context_and_audience: This document is intended for all developers contributing to ArchSpine, especially those working on domain, API, or infrastructure layers. It serves as a reference for maintaining separation of concerns and avoiding architectural violations.
key_takeaways: Domain modules must not import from infrastructure or CLI modules (Domain Isolation).
Domain should only depend on internal domain logic or generic utilities (Interface Only Dependency).
API layers should only call Service or Domain layers, not infrastructure directly (API Layer Separation).
